'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=u6QIETL3ViN8Z0K5X4g9P5hvnfxlDwbMhhvaaA4pgJk-1774332319-1.0.1.1-UQd3_0.sShP_9O9mxda15uXkBq1NdOI6opS1LqmaoGs"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
